search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20062` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_vlan=* dest_vlan=* | fillnull value=0 bytes_out packets_out | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | bin _time span=30s | stats sum(bytes) as sum_bytes by src_vlan dest_vlan src_ip src_port dest_ip dest_port transport _time | `dedup_timechart_events` | strcat src_vlan " - " dest_vlan vlan_pair | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes) by vlan_pair,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20062` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_vlan=* dest_vlan=* | fillnull value=0 bytes_out packets_out | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | fillnull value="" src_host src_vm_name dest_vm_name | stats sum(bytes_in) as sndbytes sum(bytes_out) as rcvbytes sum(packets_in) as sndpackets sum(packets_out) as rcvpackets sum(flow_count) as FlowCount by nfo_hostname src_vlan dest_vlan | eval "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %"=round((rcvbytes/sndbytes)*100,2) | eval "Packets Rcvd/Sent %"=round((rcvpackets/sndpackets)*100,2) | eval sndmegabytes = sndbytes/1024/1024 | eval rcvmegabytes = rcvbytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 by - sndmegabytes | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, sndmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(MB Received, rcvmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Sent, sndpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Received, rcvpackets)` | table nfo_hostname src_vlan dest_vlan "MB Sent" "MB Received" "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %" "Packets Sent" "Packets Received" "Packets Rcvd/Sent %" FlowCount | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename src_vlan as "Src VLAN" | rename dest_vlan as "Dest VLAN" | rename FlowCount as "Flow Count"

`netflow_search_rule_20062` nfo_hostname="$NFO$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" src_vlan="$SrcVLAN$" dest_vlan="$DestVLAN$" src_vlan=* dest_vlan=* | fillnull value=0 bytes_out packets_out | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | fillnull value="" src_host src_vm_name dest_vm_name | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | eval exp_ip_network_conversation=nfo_hostname."#".exp_ip."#".src_ip."#".l_src_host."#".src_vm_name."#".src_port."#".dest_ip."#".l_dest_host."#".dest_vm_name."#".dest_port."#".flow_type."#".transport | stats sum(bytes_in) as sndbytes sum(bytes_out) as rcvbytes sum(packets_in) as sndpackets sum(packets_out) as rcvpackets sum(flow_count) as FlowCount avg(duration) as avgduration by nfo_hostname exp_ip_network_conversation | eval temp=split(exp_ip_network_conversation,"#") | eval nfo_hostname=mvindex(temp,0) | eval exp_ip=mvindex(temp,1) | eval src_ip=mvindex(temp,2) | eval src_host=mvindex(temp,3) | eval src_vm_name=mvindex(temp,4) | eval src_port=mvindex(temp,5) | eval dest_ip=mvindex(temp,6) | eval dest_host=mvindex(temp,7) | eval dest_vm_name=mvindex(temp,8) | eval dest_port=mvindex(temp,9) | eval flow_type=mvindex(temp,10) | eval transport=mvindex(temp,11) | eval "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %"=round((rcvbytes/sndbytes)*100,2) | eval "Packets Rcvd/Sent %"=round((rcvpackets/sndpackets)*100,2) | eval sndmegabytes = sndbytes/1024/1024 | eval rcvmegabytes = rcvbytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 by - sndmegabytes | `commas_formatting(MB Sent, sndmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(MB Received, rcvmegabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Sent, sndpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Packets Received, rcvpackets)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Duration, avgduration,2)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval src_host=if(src_vm_name=="",src_host,src_host." (".src_vm_name.")") | eval dest_host=if(dest_vm_name=="",dest_host,dest_host." (".dest_vm_name.")") | `format_port_column(src_port, src_port)` | `format_port_column(dest_port, dest_port)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name flow_type transport src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host "MB Sent" "MB Received" "Bytes Rcvd/Sent %" "Packets Sent" "Packets Received" "Packets Rcvd/Sent %" FlowCount, "Avg Duration" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename src_port as "Source Port" | rename src_host as "Source Host (VM)" | rename dest_ip as "Dest IP" | rename dest_port as "Dest Port" | rename dest_host as "Dest Host (VM)" | rename flow_type as "Flow Type" | rename transport as "Protocol" | rename FlowCount as "Flow Count"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
